ideas.title: Hawker Surplus Connect
ideas.summary: Coordinate small end-of-day food rescue from willing food businesses.
ideas.target_user: volunteers and community groups in Singapore
ideas.why_fast: Mostly forms, listings, search, and lightweight dashboards. Fits a fast AI-assisted web build.
ideas.prototype_goal: Simulate the core value of Hawker Surplus Connect in-browser with believable local data and zero backend dependencies.
ideas.auth_strategy: No authentication. Use one-click persona buttons such as login as resident, customer, volunteer, caregiver, or store owner depending on the flow.

storage_strategy.secondary: IndexedDB only if the POC needs larger offline caches, many records, or image/file blobs
storage_strategy.server_database: not allowed for the initial POC

ideas.simulation_mode: Use seeded demo records, optimistic UI updates, and fake notifications or status changes so the end-to-end workflow is testable by one person.
demo_seed_data: 3 to 8 sample watchlists records tailored to Singapore context
2 to 3 personas with prefilled preferences, saved items, or history
at least 1 edge case record to demonstrate empty states, stale data, or exceptions
ideas.success_signal: A new user can switch into a persona, complete the main workflow in under 2 minutes, and understand the concept without any manual setup.
non_goals: real identity verification or account systems
production-grade multi-user synchronization
complex backend integrations before concept validation
build_notes: Prefer deterministic mock data over external APIs.
Keep state resettable so demos can be rerun quickly.
Treat notifications, queues, and matching as simulations unless a real API is trivial.

ideas.why_fast: Mostly forms, listings, search, and lightweight dashboards. Fits a fast AI-assisted web build.
ideas.prototype_goal: Simulate the core value of Beach Cleanup Board SG in-browser with believable local data and zero backend dependencies.
ideas.auth_strategy: No authentication. Use one-click persona buttons such as login as resident, customer, volunteer, caregiver, or store owner depending on the flow.

storage_strategy.secondary: IndexedDB only if the POC needs larger offline caches, many records, or image/file blobs
storage_strategy.server_database: not allowed for the initial POC

ideas.simulation_mode: Use seeded demo records, optimistic UI updates, and fake notifications or status changes so the end-to-end workflow is testable by one person.
demo_seed_data: 3 to 8 sample places records tailored to Singapore context
2 to 3 personas with prefilled preferences, saved items, or history
at least 1 edge case record to demonstrate empty states, stale data, or exceptions
ideas.success_signal: A new user can switch into a persona, complete the main workflow in under 2 minutes, and understand the concept without any manual setup.
non_goals: real identity verification or account systems
production-grade multi-user synchronization
complex backend integrations before concept validation
build_notes: Prefer deterministic mock data over external APIs.
Keep state resettable so demos can be rerun quickly.
Treat notifications, queues, and matching as simulations unless a real API is trivial.

build_intent: simulation-first concept validation for Singapore public-good apps

build_defaults.auth: No real auth. Persona switching only.
build_defaults.persistence: Prefer localStorage for user-created state and seeded simulations.
build_defaults.database_policy: Use IndexedDB only when localStorage becomes too limited for record size, quantity, or offline assets.
build_defaults.backend_policy: Avoid a server backend for the first pass unless the concept cannot be demonstrated without it.
build_defaults.simulation_policy: Workflows should be demoable by one person using seeded Singapore-specific data and fake state transitions.
build_defaults.sharing_policy: Export, copy-link, or local JSON import/export is acceptable; real accounts and cross-device sync are out of scope.

reference_guidance: Treat each idea as a POC, not a production MVP.
Assume the builder will reference this JSON directly when scaffolding the app.
Default to browser-only state, seeded data, and simulation-heavy flows.
If a multi-sided workflow exists, expose simple buttons to switch personas instead of building auth.
Use IndexedDB only if the POC genuinely needs larger offline storage than localStorage can comfortably handle.
